productDisplayName: Carlton London Men's Casual Brown Shoe
description: Perfect for those semi-formal occasions, this pair of slip-on leather shoes from carlton london is designed for the man of style.Upper Leather upper with a long tongue stitched to the toe panel in rugged ruffling for enhanced durability and style Reinforced overlay over midfoot to separate tongue and forefoot region Reinforced heel cup overlay for enhanced durability Slip-on system for easy wear Midsole TPU midsole for durability and comfort Mildly cushioned footbed for protection Outsole TPU outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Textured raised heel for grip and style Mildly curved outsole for ergonomic comfort shoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
